basic_details.job_title: UPSC IES/ISS Exam Date 2026 Announced, Download Time Table PDF
basic_details.short_information: UPSC IES/ISS Exam Date 2026: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially released the exam date and detailed timetable for the Indian Economic Service (IES) and Indian Statistical Service (ISS) Examination 2026. Candidates who have applied for the IES/ISS posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The written examination is scheduled to be held from 19th to 21st June 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards when released and prepare accordingly.

important_dates.raw: UPSC IES/ISS Exam Date 2026: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially released the exam date and detailed timetable for the Indian Economic Service (IES) and Indian Statistical Service (ISS) Examination 2026. Candidates who have applied for the IES/ISS posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The written examination is scheduled to be held from 19th to 21st June 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards when released and prepare accordingly. | TelegramJob alerts channel Join WhatsAppInstant updates Join InstagramDaily posts Follow Add FJA on As Preferred Source | Latest Update: UPSC has announced the detailed exam timetable for IES/ISS 2026 positions. The examination will be conducted from 19 to 21 June 2026 at various centers across India. The timetable was released on 02 April 2026. Candidates can download the official exam timetable from the UPSC website. | Quick Link: Download UPSC IES/ISS Exam Timetable 2026 | Key Highlights - UPSC IES/ISS Exam Date 2026 Organization: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Post Name: Indian Economic Service (IES) & Indian Statistical Service (ISS) Exam Date: 19th to 21st June 2026 (3 Days) Exam Mode: Offline (Pen and Paper / Descriptive & Objective) Official Website: https://upsc.gov.in Admit Card Release: Few weeks before the exam (e-Admit Card)

exam_pattern.details: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here’s what candidates need to know about the UPSC IES/ISS examination: | Exam Mode: Offline Pen and Paper Based Total Marks: As per standard UPSC pattern (details in notification) Number of Papers: 6 Papers (Common + Subject-specific) Duration: 3 hours per paper (2 hours for some ISS objective papers) Negative Marking: Applicable in objective papers Subjects/Sections: General English, General Studies, General Economics-I/II/III & Indian Economics (IES) or Statistics-I/II/III/IV (ISS)

faq.question: Q1. When is the UPSC IES/ISS exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The written examination is scheduled from 19th to 21st June 2026. Candidates can check the official timetable for complete details.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the UPSC IES/ISS exam timetable?
faq.answer: You can download the timetable from the official website https://upsc.gov.in or use the direct link provided above.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the UPSC IES/ISS exam date 2026?
faq.answer: As per the latest notification and timetable released on 02 April 2026, the exam is scheduled for 19-21 June 2026. Any changes will be updated on the official website.

faq.question: Q4. When will the UPSC IES/ISS admit card be released?
faq.answer: The e-Admit card is expected to be released a few weeks before the examination date. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam mode for UPSC IES/ISS 2026?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Offline (Pen and Paper) mode with a mix of Descriptive and Objective papers.
